verses.2: The rebels are deep in slaughter,
verses.4: Their deeds won’t allow them to turn to their God,
verses.5: The pride of Israel testifies to his face.
verses.6: They will go with their flocks and with their herds to seek the LORD,
verses.7: They are unfaithful to the LORD;
verses.9: Ephraim will become a desolation in the day of rebuke.
verses.10: The princes of Judah are like those who remove a landmark.
verses.12: Therefore I am to Ephraim like a moth,
verses.14: For I will be to Ephraim like a lion,
verses.15: I will go and return to my place,
